name: flowmark
description: A small Rust compiler for HTML-like templates with Angular-inspired control flow.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:dom && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm run build:astro-events && pnpm run build:prettier
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:vite && pnpm run test:runtime && pnpm run test:dom && pnpm run test:astro && pnpm run test:astro-events && pnpm run test:prettier && pnpm run test:vscode && pnpm run test:demo
scripts.test:astro: pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro test
scripts.test:demo: pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-demo run check && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-demo run test:unit
scripts.test:e2e:demo: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:dom && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm run build:astro-events && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-demo run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @flowview/runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowview/dom typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowview/vite typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-events typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowview/prettier typecheck
scripts.format: pnpm run format:rust && pnpm run format:ts
scripts.lint: pnpm run build && pnpm run format:check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-demo run lint
scripts.demo: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:dom && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm run build:astro-events && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-demo dev
scripts.build:demo: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:dom && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:astro && pnpm run build:astro-events && pnpm --filter @flowview/astro-demo run build
scripts.deploy:demo: pnpm run build:demo && pnpm exec wrangler pages deploy examples/astro-demo/dist --project-name=flowmark-demo
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm exec changeset publish
scripts.publish:rust: cargo publish -p flowmark-compiler && cargo publish -p flowmark-cli
